name: Corn Chowder (c) (Lacto)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Green bell peppers, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Add celery, onions, and green peppers to a pan sprayed with Pam. Saute for 2 minutes.
2. Add corn, potatoes, water, salt, pepper, and paprika. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium and cook, covered, about 10 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
4. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine 1/2 cup milk and flour. Shake vigorously.
5. Gradually add the mixture to the cooked vegetables, stirring constantly.
6. Add the remaining milk and cook until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens.
7. Serve garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Nutrition (per serving): 274 calories Total Fat 2 g (7% of calories)
